---
title: 'Small Wins'
date: '2016-03-21T05:18:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '9023711384838985816'
blogger_filename: '/2016/03/small-wins.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Money'
  - 'Feelings'
  - 'Car'
  - 'Life Events'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
I had the Check Engine light go off on the car. That, alone, has been enough to put me into a funk for weeks. I breathed, tried not to panic.</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.oreillyauto.com/site/c/home.oap" href="http://www.oreillyauto.com/site/c/home.oap" style="color: #00aadc;" target="_blank">O'Reilly Auto</a>&nbsp;Parts pulled the code, and it was a Thermostat ($30). Most shops wanted $200 for the repair (including parts), but YouTube made it look like I could do it myself.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
It's estimated to take a professional mechanic 1.5 hours, it took me 4 hours. Yeah! I did it.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
I didn't even kick and scream and yell once. I did loose a tool in the engine area... but I stayed calm, and got it out, and continued.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
Celebrating the small wins tonight.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px;">
Darrell</div>
